title: Middle Eastern Prawn Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic stew originating from the Middle East, cooked in a traditional earthenware tagine with succulent prawns and a sweet and sticky syrupy sauce.

ingredients.name: prawns (6-8)
ingredients.notes: fresh or frozen, peeled and deveined

instructions: Heat oil in the tagine over medium-high heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add cumin, coriander, and cinnamon, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add prawns and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Add syrupy and lemon juice, and stir to combine.
Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to low and cook, covered, for 10-15 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with parsley and serve over rice or with crusty bread.
